prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省最低录取位次分别为约15258名、15247名、15142名、17926名、17433名。2021–2023年位次稳定在15100–15200区间，2024年骤降约2784名至1 7926，2025年小幅回升约493名至17433。近两年位次整体后移约2300名，波动幅度明显加大；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021年61人、2022年63人、2023年64 人、2024年66人、2025年65人、2026年（招生计划文件）64人。2026年较2025年减少1人，小幅缩招约1.5%，对竞争略有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
北京交通大学为211工程、双 一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第41名，近年排名稳定在40–43区间，属于国内顶尖211院校，办学层次和综合实力对考生有持续吸引力；2026年高考 周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及实验室爆炸安全事故，可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度评级为较热（总排名第45），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上；历史投档 异常记录中未见明显断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，系统科学获评A+（全国唯一），交通运输工程、信息与通信工程获评A，计算机科学与技术、土木工程、管 理科学与工程获评A-。系统科学A+和交通运输A为全国顶尖水平，与该校招生专业中的交通运输类、理科试验班（系统科学方向）高度关联，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
6. 【专业热度与环境】计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续高热推荐；交通运输类受益于轨道交通行业景气度保持稳定热度；土木建筑类社会热度 明显劝退；新闻传播学类明显劝退。浙江省2026年考生总数约400,000人（普通高考口径），较2025年290,790人增幅约37.5%，即使考虑口径差异，竞争基数显著扩大。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 北京交通大学位于北京市，非浙江省本地高校。该校在浙江省招生占比约1.2%–2.0%（2021–2025年），属于跨省招生中占比偏低的 省份，招生规模较小，易受报考热度波动影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次17433名、2026年计划小幅缩招1人、浙江省考生总数大幅增加约37.5%带来的竞争加剧、声 誉偏负面轻微抑制、以及抖音较热维持一定关注度，预计2026年最低录取位次在17433基础上小幅上移。预测最低位次约17472名，区间16972–17972名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班类（詹天佑试点班信息类/智能类）
- 计算机类
- 自动化类（智能系统与智能制造）
- 电子信息类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 法学
- 理科试验班（含系统科学与工程、数学、统计、物理等）
- 文科试验班类（经济管理人才试点班）
- 交通运输类
- 新闻传播学类（卓越人才拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 建筑类（卓越人才拔尖班）
- 经济管理试验班。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间16972–17972名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（法学、理科试验班、交通运输类），一档专业（詹天佑试点班、计算机类）作为冲刺，三档专业（建筑类、经济 管理试验班）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（16972名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（17972名附近）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings in Zhejiang Province were approximately 15258, 15247, 15142, 17926, and 17433 respectively. Rankings were stable in the 15100–15200 range from 2021 to 2023, then dropped sharply by about 2784 places to 17926 in 2024, and slightly recovered by about 493 places to 17433 in 2025. Over the past two years, the overall ranking has shifted backward by about 2300 places, with significantly increased volatility. The comprehensive enrollment plan for this university in Zhejiang Province was 61 in 2021, 63 in 2022, 64 in 2023, 66 in 2024, 65 in 2025, and 64 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document). In 2026, compared to 2025, there is a reduction of 1 student, a slight contraction of about 1.5%, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 41st, with stable rankings in the 40–43 range in recent years. It is a top-tier 211 university, and its institutional level and comprehensive strength continue to attract students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion safety incident, which may mildly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity rating is relatively hot (ranked 45th overall), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms. No significant gaps are observed in historical admission anomaly records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Systems Science was rated A+ (the only one nationwide), Transportation Engineering and Information and Communication Engineering were rated A, and Computer Science and Technology, Civil Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering were rated A-. The A+ in Systems Science and A in Transportation represent the national top level, which is highly correlated with the university's enrollment majors such as Transportation and Science Experimental Class (Systems Science direction), strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing and is not a local university in Zhejiang Province. Its enrollment proportion in Zhejiang Province is about 1.2%–2.0% (2021–2025), which is a relatively low proportion among cross-provincial enrollments. The enrollment scale is small, making it susceptible to fluctuations in application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 17433, a slight reduction of 1 student in the 2026 plan, intensified competition due to a significant increase of about 37.5% in the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province, a slightly negative reputation with mild suppression, and sustained attention from relatively hot Douyin popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly upward from 17433. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 17472, with a range of 16972–17972.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Science Experimental Class (Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class Information/Smart)
- Computer Science
- Automation (Intelligent Systems and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Electronic Information
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Law
- Science Experimental Class (including Systems Science and Engineering, Mathematics, Statistics, Physics, etc.)
- Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Economics and Management Talent Pilot Class)
- Transportation
- Journalism and Communication (Outstanding Talent Top Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Architecture (Outstanding Talent Top Class)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 16972–17972, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Law, Science Experimental Class, Transportation) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class, Computer Science) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Architecture, Economics and Management Experimental Class) as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 16972), focus on sprinting for top Tier 1 majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 17972), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety.
